name: Trailbreaker Resources Ltd.
summary: Trailbreaker Resources Ltd. operates as a mineral exploration company in Canada. It primarily explores for gold. The company holds 100% interest in 4 properties located in British Columbia and Yukon Territory. Its projects include Atsutla gold project consisting of 19 mineral tenures and covering an area of approximately 23,000 hectares; the Plateau property covering an area of approximately 120 kilometers; the Skelly property covering an area of 2,526 hectares; and McMurdo property covering an area of 1,728 hectares. The company was formerly known as Goldstrike Resources Ltd. and changed its name to Trailbreaker Resources Ltd. in March 2021. Trailbreaker Resources Ltd. is based in Vancouver, Canada.
